# For

A loop utility component for rendering lists of items. Accepts an array and a render function as children, with an optional fallback for empty arrays.

## Import

```jsx
import { For } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `each` | `T[]` | - | The array of items to iterate over. |
| `fallback` | `ReactNode` | - | Content to render when the array is empty or undefined. |

## Usage

### Basic List Rendering

```jsx
<For each={["Apple", "Banana", "Cherry"]}>
  {(item, index) => <p key={index}>{item}</p>}
</For>
```

### With Fallback

```jsx
<For each={items} fallback={<p>No items found.</p>}>
  {(item) => (
    <Box key={item.id} p="2">
      {item.name}
    </Box>
  )}
</For>
```

### Rendering Complex Items

```jsx
<For each={users} fallback={<EmptyState><EmptyStateTitle>No users</EmptyStateTitle></EmptyState>}>
  {(user) => (
    <HStack key={user.id} gap="4" p="3">
      <Avatar name={user.name} src={user.avatar} />
      <Box>
        <Text fontWeight="bold">{user.name}</Text>
        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">{user.email}</Text>
      </Box>
    </HStack>
  )}
</For>
```
